data.evidence: Added go-auto run_envelope with preflight/budget/run-until/checkpoint/result schema; verified pytest -q and make check.

Documented Hermes executor boundary for go auto: execution_policy plus run_envelope, immediate tool-call loop, verification/recheck/devil/harden, finish evidence, self-reflect, and compact handoff. Verified pytest -q and make check.
Router now distinguishes create_repo from repair_existing_repo and repair examples include --skip-repo-complete; direct tests cover existing git repo without .go. Verified pytest -q and make check.

Self-reflect follow-up implemented: go spike now has --task-scope code|docs; default code generates tasks with cli/go.py, tests/**, docs/** and Makefile scope, preventing manual scope repair for implementation repos. Verified pytest -q and make check.

Implemented go auto/go-loop --emit-handoff with go-workflow.agent-handoff.v1 including repo, mode, target runtime, tasks, scope, gates, expected evidence, execution_policy, and run_envelope. Verified pytest -q, make check, and go-project-template make check.
python3 cli/go.py template-check ../go-project-template --json ok=true; make check passed; pytest -q passed (8 passed)
python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; python3 cli/go.py template-check ../go-project-template --json ok=true

Documented bare-go autonomous loop contract; updated vision/principles, README, router docs, runtime skill, CLI loop contract, and tests; verification passed: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q, git diff --check

Added go auto/go-loop budget fields max_minutes, max_commands, checkpoint_every_tasks, quiet telegram_policy, command/checkpoint result accounting, tests for budget envelope and checkpoints; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed; git diff --check passed

Upgraded auto --execute result model with commands_run/checkpoints/budget_exhausted, max command/minute budget enforcement, own-lifecycle dirty continuation across multiple tasks, actionable safety/blocked states, and regression test for two-task execution; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed

Added bare  CLI universal router that distinguishes missing repo/missing .go/invalid contract from repo-local execution, creates a scoped task from actionable intent when no open task exists, returns go-auto/go-loop plan, and has regression test; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed
Added explicit no-command-spam rule and hard-gate-only ask policy to repo-local-agent-workflow skill; verified with python3 cli/go.py validate ., template-check JSON, git diff --check

Self-reflect follow-up resolved: bare go now has CLI subcommand, intent task creation, go-loop routing, budgeted handoff, skill no-command-spam mandate, and full green verification; checks: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q 10 passed, git diff --check

Added explicit bare go --write boundary: default go --json with intent is non-mutating and returns proposed_task/write_boundary; --write or --execute materializes intent-created tasks. Verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Added structured go-loop/auto execute attempts with build/verify/critic/repair/judge fields, auto.attempt events, and failing verification critic evidence before blocking. Verification: pytest -q 11 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Added docs/autonomy-benchmark.md with PASS/PARTIAL/MISS Ralph/Oh-My-Codex matrix and promotion criteria; linked from go-autonomous-loop docs; test asserts proven/partial/missing claims. Verification: pytest -q 12 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Implemented pluggable Ralph-style executor adapter hooks: --build-command, --critic-command, --repair-command, --max-attempts; go-loop now runs bounded attempt ladder with build/verify/critic/repair/judge evidence and can repair a failing fixture without user intervention. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed; validate passed; git diff --check passed.

Promoted autonomy benchmark to PASS where adapter proof exists: docs/autonomy-benchmark.md now states Ralph/Oh-My-Codex-style runtime via adapter boundary; docs/go-autonomous-loop.md and repo-local skill document build/critic/repair adapter hooks and honest limits. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed; validate passed; git diff --check passed.

Corrected Ralph/OMX benchmark overclaim: full autonomous runtime and equivalence are PARTIAL until default adapters/artifacts/followups/resume/ship policy are proven. Added regression test preventing blanket PASS equivalence claim. Verification: pytest -q and make check passed.

Added per-attempt artifact ledger under .go/runs/<task-id>/attempt-XX/ with prompt.md, verify.log, critic.md, diff.patch, verdict.json. Attempt JSONL now links artifacts. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed.
